name: Jump
description: a short upward blip as the character hops

ai.prompt: A character hop/jump: a soft cloth-and-body effort with a light launch whoosh, grounded and organic, no cartoon boing. High-fidelity recorded foley, close-miked, crisp transient, rich body, natural short tail; single isolated sound; dry with only a subtle natural room; no music, no voice, no melody, no chiptune, no synth beeps, no background noise; broadcast-quality, production-ready.
